news.title:
Sunteck Realty transferred 100% stake in Mantavya Real Estates to Sunteck Real Estates, making it a step-down subsidiary.
Transaction, a related party deal, was completed on April 6, 2026, for Rs. 1,00,000 on an arm's length basis.
news.summary:
Sunteck Realty transferred 100% stake in Mantavya Real Estates to Sunteck Real Estates, making it a step-down subsidiary.
Transaction, a related party deal, was completed on April 6, 2026, for Rs. 1,00,000 on an arm's length basis.

news.title:
Sunteck Realty restructures subsidiaries; Magenta and Sunteck Infracon become step-down subsidiaries.
Transactions classified as related party, done at arm's length; no revenue recorded for Magenta last FY.
news.summary:
Sunteck Realty restructures subsidiaries; Magenta and Sunteck Infracon become step-down subsidiaries.
Transactions classified as related party, done at arm's length; no revenue recorded for Magenta last FY.

news.title:
Sunteck Realty to join Bharat Connect Conference by Arihant Capital virtually on 10th March 2026.
No unpublished price-sensitive info will be shared during the group analyst/investor meetings.
news.summary:
Sunteck Realty to join Bharat Connect Conference by Arihant Capital virtually on 10th March 2026.
No unpublished price-sensitive info will be shared during the group analyst/investor meetings.

news.title:
Sunteck Realty Ltd formed two subsidiaries, Satshay Lifespace and Taraksh Real Estates, in India.
The move aims to enhance their operations in construction and real estate sectors.
news.summary:
Sunteck Realty Ltd formed two subsidiaries, Satshay Lifespace and Taraksh Real Estates, in India.
The move aims to enhance their operations in construction and real estate sectors.

news.title:
Sunteck Realty targets ₹3,000 Cr FY26 pre-sales, with ₹900 Cr from Q4.
Pre-sales expected to grow 25-30% QoQ, led by luxury segment boosting margins.
news.summary:
Sunteck Realty targets ₹3,000 Cr FY26 pre-sales, with ₹900 Cr from Q4.
Pre-sales expected to grow 25-30% QoQ, led by luxury segment boosting margins.

news.title:
Sunteck Realty Q3 EBITDA rose to ₹815M from ₹483.8M YoY.
EBITDA margin fell to 23.7% from 29.9% YoY.
news.summary:
Sunteck Realty Q3 EBITDA rose to ₹815M from ₹483.8M YoY.
EBITDA margin fell to 23.7% from 29.9% YoY.

news.title:
Sunteck Realty's board approved unaudited financial results for Q3 and 9M FY26 with a profit of ₹5,683.96 lakh.
Board reappointed Independent Directors Mr. Mukesh Jain and Mr. Chaitanya Dalal for a second term, pending shareholder approval.
news.summary:
Sunteck Realty's board approved unaudited financial results for Q3 and 9M FY26 with a profit of ₹5,683.96 lakh.
Board reappointed Independent Directors Mr. Mukesh Jain and Mr. Chaitanya Dalal for a second term, pending shareholder approval.

news.title:
Sunteck Realty allotted 3,52,941 shares at ₹425 each via warrant conversion by NTAsian Discovery Master Fund.
Paid-up share capital increased from 14.64 cr to 14.68 cr; shares rank equally with existing equity.
news.summary:
Sunteck Realty allotted 3,52,941 shares at ₹425 each via warrant conversion by NTAsian Discovery Master Fund.
Paid-up share capital increased from 14.64 cr to 14.68 cr; shares rank equally with existing equity.

news.title:
Sunteck Realty acquires a 2-acre plot in Andheri East, Mumbai, with ₹2,500 crore GDV.
The land faced over a decade of litigation involving multiple stakeholders.
news.summary:
Sunteck Realty acquires a 2-acre plot in Andheri East, Mumbai, with ₹2,500 crore GDV.
The land faced over a decade of litigation involving multiple stakeholders.

news.title:
Sunteck Realty's board to meet on Jan 27, 2026, to approve Q3 and 9-month FY25 results.
Trading window for Sunteck Realty remains closed till 48 hours post-results announcement.
news.summary:
Sunteck Realty's board to meet on Jan 27, 2026, to approve Q3 and 9-month FY25 results.
Trading window for Sunteck Realty remains closed till 48 hours post-results announcement.

news.title:
Sunteck Realty plans a ₹3,000 crore ultra-luxury project in Goregaon, Mumbai.
Phase 1, with a GDV of ₹1,250 crore, includes 225 units over 0.5 msf.
news.summary:
Sunteck Realty plans a ₹3,000 crore ultra-luxury project in Goregaon, Mumbai.
Phase 1, with a GDV of ₹1,250 crore, includes 225 units over 0.5 msf.

news.title:
Sunteck Realty's subsidiary, Clarissa Facility Management LLP, converted into Clarissa Facility Management Pvt Ltd.
The conversion, effective 7th Jan 2026, retains it as a wholly-owned subsidiary of Sunteck Realty.
news.summary:
Sunteck Realty's subsidiary, Clarissa Facility Management LLP, converted into Clarissa Facility Management Pvt Ltd.
The conversion, effective 7th Jan 2026, retains it as a wholly-owned subsidiary of Sunteck Realty.

news.title:
Sunteck Realty rose 8.1% to Rs 428.2 after GST ruling in its favor.
The tax demand stemmed from a 2025 show cause notice under GST Act Section 73.
news.summary:
Sunteck Realty rose 8.1% to Rs 428.2 after GST ruling in its favor.
The tax demand stemmed from a 2025 show cause notice under GST Act Section 73.

news.title:
Sunteck Realty's tax demand and penalty nullified by GST office.
Tax dispute from October 2025 resolved after company's arguments were accepted.
news.summary:
Sunteck Realty's tax demand and penalty nullified by GST office.
Tax dispute from October 2025 resolved after company's arguments were accepted.

news.title:
Sunteck Realty Ltd announced the incorporation of a wholly owned subsidiary, Etashi Real Estates Pvt Ltd.
The subsidiary, focused on real estate activities, was incorporated on Dec 22, 2025, with 100% ownership by Sunteck Realty.
news.summary:
Sunteck Realty Ltd announced the incorporation of a wholly owned subsidiary, Etashi Real Estates Pvt Ltd.
The subsidiary, focused on real estate activities, was incorporated on Dec 22, 2025, with 100% ownership by Sunteck Realty.

news.title:
Sunteck Realty closed at 404.95, down 1.71% on Dec 5, continuing its downward trend.
Decline attributed to disappointing financial results and weak performance against benchmarks.
news.summary:
Sunteck Realty closed at 404.95, down 1.71% on Dec 5, continuing its downward trend.
Decline attributed to disappointing financial results and weak performance against benchmarks.

news.title:
Sunteck Realty allotted 11.76 cr convertible warrants at ₹425 each via preferential allotment.
₹500 cr total consideration; 25% upfront received; remaining payable within 18 months.
news.summary:
Sunteck Realty allotted 11.76 cr convertible warrants at ₹425 each via preferential allotment.
₹500 cr total consideration; 25% upfront received; remaining payable within 18 months.

news.title:
Cello World enters agreement to assign Cello Brand trademark for stationery and writing instruments, zero royalty.
Dr. Reddy’s, Paras Defence among 10 stocks in focus on Nov 25.
news.summary:
Cello World enters agreement to assign Cello Brand trademark for stationery and writing instruments, zero royalty.
Dr. Reddy’s, Paras Defence among 10 stocks in focus on Nov 25.

news.title:
Sunteck Realty enters Dubai with a ₹10,000 crore luxury project, featuring premium apartments and branded residences.
Indian developers, like Sunteck and Sobha, expand to Dubai, leveraging its strong property market and favorable conditions.
news.summary:
Sunteck Realty enters Dubai with a ₹10,000 crore luxury project, featuring premium apartments and branded residences.
Indian developers, like Sunteck and Sobha, expand to Dubai, leveraging its strong property market and favorable conditions.

news.title:
Sunteck Realty's Dubai arm resolved arbitration with Grand Valley; London court confirmed claim withdrawal.
Shares of Sunteck Realty fell 0.99% to ₹414.7; Q2 net profit rose 41% to ₹48.96 crore on higher income.
news.summary:
Sunteck Realty's Dubai arm resolved arbitration with Grand Valley; London court confirmed claim withdrawal.
Shares of Sunteck Realty fell 0.99% to ₹414.7; Q2 net profit rose 41% to ₹48.96 crore on higher income.
